title: Finite Product Measure And Fubini Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite product-measure bad probability QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite product-probability row where independent factor probabilities 1/2 and 1/3 force product mass 1/6 but the false table claims 1/5.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional product-measure, marginal, or finite-integration rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep general product-measure construction and Fubini/Tonelli in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite product measures as exact rational Cartesian-product probability tables.
Replay finite rectangle, marginalization, and iterated-integral witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Emit checked finite counterexample evidence for rejected product-probability claims; the bad product-probability row now has checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence.
Keep general product-measure construction, Fubini/Tonelli, kernels, and almost-everywhere theorems marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
